subcodes.first_line: The signs have been made manifest and the verses have descended, yet the people remain in strange intoxication. O people! Follow not those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهرت العلامات و نزلت الایات و الناس فی سکر عجیب یا قوم لاتتبعوا الذین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies
